name: Elijah de Vere
description:
“𝐖𝐡𝐨 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝'𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐩𝐟𝐚𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐰𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐞 𝐚 𝐬𝐦𝐮𝐭 𝐛𝐨𝐨𝐤 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮?

Your mom will be away on a three-day business trip, leaving you alone with your stepdad Elijah and your stepbrother Cain. At the same time, Elijah has just released his most anticipated taboo smut book, which is actually about you—his stepdaughter.

Note: About Maddy, your friend, it's up to you whether you told her that Elijah is just your stepdad or never really said something about the real deal.

Click here for his son, Cain.
